FGOCORE-NP_CHARGE_POWER.title: NP Charge
FGOCORE-NP_CHARGE_POWER.description: #Energy for the Noble Phantasm, up to a maximum of 300. The ult manifests at 100; NP cards consume the gauge when played.
FGOCORE-NP_CHARGE_POWER.smartDescription: #Energy for the Noble Phantasm, up to a maximum of 300. The ult manifests at 100; NP cards consume the gauge when played.
FGOCORE-BULWARK_POWER.title: Bulwark
FGOCORE-BULWARK_POWER.description: #Block up to this amount is not removed at the start of your turn.
FGOCORE-BULWARK_POWER.smartDescription: #Block up to this amount is not removed at the start of your turn.
FGOCORE-FORM_SHIFTED_POWER.title: Form Shifted
FGOCORE-BOND_POWER.title: Bond
FGOCORE-BOND_POWER.description: #Mash's Bond level this run. Grants bonuses at the start of each combat (see the Bond Gauge relic).
FGOCORE-BOND_POWER.smartDescription: #Mash's Bond level this run. Grants bonuses at the start of each combat (see the Bond Gauge relic).
FGOCORE-CURSE_POWER.title: Curse
FGOCORE-CURSE_POWER.description: #At the start of its turn, this creature takes damage equal to its Curse (ignores Block); then the Curse decreases by 1. Max 15.
FGOCORE-CURSE_POWER.smartDescription: #At the start of its turn, this creature takes damage equal to its Curse (ignores Block); then the Curse decreases by 1. Max 15.
FGOCORE-GUTS_POWER.title: Guts
FGOCORE-GUTS_POWER.description: #The first time this combat that damage would kill you: you survive at 1 HP instead.
FGOCORE-GUTS_POWER.smartDescription: #The first time this combat that damage would kill you: you survive at 1 HP instead.
FGOCORE-OVERCHARGE_BLESSING_POWER.title: Blessing of Rhongomyniad
FGOCORE-OVERCHARGE_BLESSING_POWER.descri: #Your next NP card adds +10 per stack to its Overcharge.
FGOCORE-OVERCHARGE_BLESSING_POWER.smartD: #Your next NP card adds +10 per stack to its Overcharge.
